title: Worker deployment exposed connection startup failure
failure_mechanism: A new consumer version could not establish required dependency connections during startup under existing load, reducing healthy consumer capacity and amplifying retry traffic.
mitigation_summary: The queue declined after healthy consumer capacity returned and retry pressure subsided; the historical record does not prescribe an action for a new incident.
timeline_summary: The backlog began shortly after a worker deployment. New consumers failed readiness, leaving fewer healthy consumers to process delivery events.
narrative_safe: RelayOps webhook delivery consumers began failing shortly after a deployment. Queue depth increased while new worker instances failed readiness. This is a candidate precedent only when the deployed version and consumer-error pattern are confirmed.
